filters.label: Test
filters.optionsSql: SELECT DISTINCT panel_desc FROM lab_requests WHERE panel_desc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY panel_desc

query.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_results
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND observation_desc = {{test}}]]

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0
  THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('final','amended') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0)
  ELSE 100 END AS value
FROM diagnostic_reports

SELECT panel_desc AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE panel_desc IS NOT NULL
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY panel_desc
ORDER BY value DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 15 ROWS ONLY

SELECT substring(authored_at,1,10) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY substring(authored_at,1,10)
ORDER BY label

SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT priority AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
WHERE priority IS NOT NULL
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
GROUP BY priority
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT 'Ordered' AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'Specimen Received', COUNT(*) FROM specimens WHERE received_time IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Result Recorded', COUNT(*) FROM lab_results
UNION ALL SELECT 'Report Issued', COUNT(*) FROM diagnostic_reports WHERE issued IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_results
WHERE abnormal_flag IN ('H','HH','L','LL','A','AA')
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]

SELECT substring(result_timestamp,1,10) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM lab_results
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(result_timestamp,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND observation_desc = {{test}}]]
GROUP BY substring(result_timestamp,1,10)
ORDER BY label

SELECT observation_desc AS label, COUNT(*) AS x, ROUND(CAST(AVG(numeric_value) AS decimal(18,4)), 2) AS y
FROM lab_results
WHERE numeric_value IS NOT NULL AND observation_desc IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY observation_desc
ORDER BY x DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT request_id AS order_id, panel_desc AS test, status, priority, substring(authored_at,1,10) AS authored
FROM lab_requests
WHERE 1=1
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) >= {{period_from}}]]
[[AND substring(authored_at,1,10) <= {{period_to}}]]
[[AND panel_desc = {{test}}]]
[[AND priority = {{priority}}]]
ORDER BY authored_at DESC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 50 ROWS ONLY
